content: No files or folders match this filter. Try a different one or clear filter to view all files.

comment.text: This translation key is used for a message displayed when no files or folders match a filter. It appears as a description text in an empty screen, suggesting alternative actions to try or clear the filter to view all files.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'clear filter' was translated as 'فلتراً واضحًا' (a clear filter), which changes the meaning from an action (to clear/remove the filter) to a description of a filter's state. This makes the instruction nonsensical in Arabic.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: لا توجد ملفات أو مجلدات تطابق هذا الفلتر. جرب فلتراً مختلفاً أو امسح الفلتر لعرض جميع الملفات.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'մաքուր զտիչ' (makur ztich) literally means 'clean filter', which is a mistranslation of 'clear filter' (meaning to remove/reset the filter). In Armenian, 'մաքուր' refers to cleanliness/purity, whereas the action of clearing a filter should be expressed as 'ջնջել' (delete/clear) or 'հեռացնել' (remove).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ոչ մի ֆայլ կամ պանակ չի համապատասխանում այս զտիչին: Փորձեք մեկ այլը կամ ջնջեք զտիչը՝ բոլոր ֆայլերը դիտելու համար:

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Lao translation 'ລຶບລ້າງຂໍ້ມູນ' (clear data) is used instead of 'ລຶບລ້າງຕົວກັ່ນຕອງ' (clear filter). This changes the meaning from clearing the filter to clearing all data/information.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ບໍ່ມີໄຟລ໌ ຫຼື ແຟ້ມໃດທີ່ກົງກັບຕົວກັ່ນຕອງນີ້. ລອງໃຊ້ຕົວກັ່ນຕອງອື່ນ ຫຼື ລຶບລ້າງຕົວກັ່ນຕອງເພື່ອເບິ່ງໄຟລ໌ທັງໝົດ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'transparente' (transparent) was used instead of 'limpar' (clear/remove) for the filter action, which changes the meaning of the instruction.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nenhum arquivo ou pasta corresponde a este filtro. Tente um filtro diferente ou limpe o filtro para visualizar todos os arquivos.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase 'ose të pastër' is grammatically incorrect in this context. It translates literally to 'or to clean', whereas it should be 'or clear the filter' (ose pastroni filtrin).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Asnjë skedar apo dosje nuk përputhet me këtë filtër. Provoni një filtër të ndryshëm ose pastroni filtrin për të parë të gjithë skedarët.
